# Learniby

> Learniby is a Bangla-language premium recorded-course portal for students and learners.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Learniby landing page — what the platform offers.
- [Course Portal](/course): Student dashboard for enrolled batches and recorded classes.
- [Login](/course/login): Sign in to the student course portal.
- [Register](/course/register): Create a new student account.
- [Forgot Password](/course/forgot-password): Reset your password.
